prompt: Say something to steady my waste disposal cycling in emergency situation
prayer:
From the Codex Purificationis, Emergency Protocol

First: Open the containment-seals with the Key-Mantra of Necessity.
Second: Channel the refuse-spirits into the recycling-crucible with steady pressure-invocation.
Third: Seal the purification-chambers and speak the Rite of Finality.

By the Omnissiah's mercy, let waste become resource.

prompt: We need your words before waste recycling activation after repair consecration
prayer:
Litany of Renewal, Post-Restoration

First: Bless the collector-apparatus that it may gather the discarded offerings.
Second: Invoke the sorting-spirits to distinguish the worthy from the corrupt.
Third: Activate the thermal-purifiers that all may be made clean again.

The cycle turns eternal.

prompt: Blessing for coolant leak repair during routine operation
prayer:
Prayer of the Fluid-Pathways

First: Identify the rupture in the sacred circulation-vessels.
Second: Apply the sealant-compound whilst chanting the Mantra of Adhesion.
Third: Refill the coolant-reservoirs and purge the air-pockets with reverence.

Let the Machine's lifeblood flow pure.

prompt: My Land Raider track tension is failing, help with first use blessing
prayer:
Rite of the Armored Tread, Initial Activation

First: Inspect each track-link for alignment and integrity.
Second: Engage the tension-adjuster-servo until resistance is felt at the prescribed measure.
Third: Drive the beast in circles, feeling the track-spirit settle into its ordained path.

May the Land Raider's stride be eternal.

prompt: Say something to steady my relay station handoff during maintenance ritual
prayer:
Mantra of the Signal-Bridge

First: Disconnect the outbound-feed with the gesture of Severance.
Second: Transfer authority to the secondary-relay whilst speaking the Rite of Continuity.
Third: Reconnect the primary-conduits and verify the signal-flow with blessed instruments.

No message shall be lost to the void.

prompt: Say something to steady my inventory stocktaking during first use blessing
prayer:
Litany of Enumeration, Primary Counting

First: Cleanse the tally-slate and prepare the counting-apparatus with sacred oils.
Second: Process each component-unit through the scanner-mechanism, recording its essence.
Third: Cross-reference the manifest against the physical-holding and speak the Rite of Concordance.

All shall be known to the Omnissiah.

prompt: Emergency rite for wear inspection in critical situation
prayer:
Rite of Swift Assessment, Urgency Protocol

First: Scan the affected surfaces with the auspex-device, searching for degradation-signs.
Second: Mark all wear-points with the blessed chalk and categorize by severity.
Third: Report findings to the Tech-Priest and recommend immediate action or deferred maintenance.

Time is the enemy of all machines.

prompt: We need your words before servitor crane operation during maintenance ritual
prayer:
Prayer of the Lifting-Spirit, Servitor Activation

First: Awaken the servitor-mind with the Call-Frequency upon the vox-caster.
Second: Direct the crane-apparatus to the lift-position using hand-gestures and blessed commands.
Third: Engage the hydraulic-muscles with steady pressure-increments until the load is suspended.

The machine-slave obeys the will of the Omnissiah.

prompt: Emergency rite for Taurox wheel alignment after post-repair consecration
prayer:
Rite of the Rolling-Path, Swift Realignment

First: Mount the alignment-frame upon each wheel-hub and check the angle-deviation.
Second: Adjust the suspension-linkages using the servo-wrench until angles align with the blessed template.
Third: Test the vehicle's bearing-truth by piloting in a straight line and confirming no drift-tendency.

Let the Taurox's way be true and swift.
